title: dryopteris remota
intro: Dryopteris remota, also known as the Ostrich Fern, is a type of flowering plant in the fern family that is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing the risk of heart disease, and acting as an anti-oxidant. Herbal preparations of Dryopteris remota can be made by infusing the dried fronds in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots and rhizomes in a decoction or tincture.
